html:
Exclusive to:  

The Cat Cap is a Hat Item in the Reign of Giants DLC. It is found in the Dress Tab, requires 1 Cat Tails and 4 Silk to craft and an Alchemy Engine to prototype. The Sewing Kit repairs 50% of its durability.

Cat Caps restore 3.3 Sanity/min while worn and are tier 1 warm clothing items, increasing the time a character can be without a fire during the Winter before Freezing. They have an insulation factor of 60.

Since Catcoons can easily go extinct on a map, and only drop their Cat Tails by chance, it is best to keep this Hat maintained with a Sewing Kit.

Contents

  • 1 Downloadable Content
  • 2 Trivia
  • 3 Assets
  • 4 Gallery

Downloadable Content

Cat Caps are also included in the Hamlet DLC, however, they cannot be crafted. Instead, they can be bought for 10 Oincs at The Sow's Ear Hat Shop in the Pig City.

Trivia

  • Since Catcoon is a portmanteau of "cat " and "raccoon", this item is most likely based on the real life Coonskin Cap, made most famous by the frontiersman Davy Crockett. Wickerbottom's quote references this by saying "Not quite like Crockett's, but it'll do."
  • Visually, the Cat Cap also resembles an Ushanka Cap.
  • In older versions of Reign of Giants, the Cat Cap had resistance to wetness and was dropped outright by killing Catcoons.

Assets

  • Dropped
  • Winter Hat Equipped

Gallery

  • Wilson wearing a Cat Cap.
  • Willow wearing a Cat Cap.
  • Wolfgang wearing a Cat Cap.

  • Wurt wearing a Cat Cap.

"catcoonhat"
“Ears hat!”
–Wilson
“Cuddly hat.”
–Willow
“Now Wolfgang not trust himself.”
–Wolfgang
“Nothing like the stench of death on my head.”
–Wendy
“FURRY HEAD COVERING”
–WX-78
“Not quite like Crockett's, but it'll do.”
–Wickerbottom
“The traditional garb of the woodsman.”
–Woodie
“Dead head.”
–Maxwell
“For something fashioned from spider webs it's remarkably unsticky.”
–Wagstaff
“A furry cap! Blessings tö yöu, cute meat.”
–Wigfrid
“Hat of a cat.”
–Webber
“I can feel the spirits of catcoons that made it.”
–Walani
“Not quite my style.”
–Warly
“Hope none o'me mates catch me in this gettup.”
–Woodlegs
“WILBA HAST KITTY FOR MINE HEAD”
–Wilba
“Kitty thing for head”
–Wormwood
“It's like walking around with a cat on my head.”
–Wheeler
“Do I look like a fur trader?”
–Winona
“It's a stripey horn concealer.”
–Wortox
“Ha ha, is hat now.”
–Wurt
“Now this is a hat made for the wilderness!”
–Walter
“Their sacrifice will keep me warm and alive.”
–Wanda
The Cat Cap is a Hat Item in the Reign of Giants DLC. It is found in the Dress Tab, requires 1 Cat Tails and 4 Silk to craft and an Alchemy Engine to prototype. The Sewing Kit repairs 50% of its durability.
Cat Caps restore 3.3 Sanity/min while worn and are tier 1 warm clothing items, increasing the time a character can be without a fire during the Winter before Freezing. They have an insulation factor of 60.
Since Catcoons can easily go extinct on a map, and only drop their Cat Tails by chance, it is best to keep this Hat maintained with a Sewing Kit.

Downloadable Content[edit | edit source]
Cat Caps are also included in the Hamlet DLC, however, they cannot be crafted. Instead, they can be bought for 10 Oincs at The Sow's Ear Hat Shop in the Pig City.
Trivia[edit | edit source]
Since Catcoon is a portmanteau of "cat " and "raccoon", this item is most likely based on the real life Coonskin Cap, made most famous by the frontiersman Davy Crockett. Wickerbottom's quote references this by saying "Not quite like Crockett's, but it'll do."
Visually, the Cat Cap also resembles an Ushanka Cap.
In older versions of Reign of Giants, the Cat Cap had resistance to wetness and was dropped outright by killing Catcoons.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Mũ Mèo là Vật Phẩm Mũ trong DLC ​​Reign of Giants. Nó được tìm thấy trong Thẻ Trang Phục, yêu cầu 1 Đuôi Mèo và 4 Tơ để chế tạo và Máy Luyện Kim để nguyên mẫu. Bộ May vá sửa chữa 50% độ bền của nó.

It is found in the [[Dress Tab]], requires 1 [[Cat Tail]]s and 4 [[Silk]] to craft and an [[Alchemy Engine]] to prototype. The [[Sewing Kit]] repairs 50% of its durability. Cat Caps restore 3.3 [[Sanity]]/min while worn and are ''tier 1'' warm clothing items, increasing the time a character can be without a fire during the [[Winter]] before [[Freezing]]. They have an [[Freezing#Game Mechanics|insulation factor]] of 60. Since [[Catcoons]] can easily go extinct on a map, and only drop their Cat Tails by chance, it is best to keep this Hat maintained with a Sewing Kit. =={{Pic32|Gift Icon}} Downloadable Content == Cat Caps are also included in the ''[[Don't Starve: Hamlet|Hamlet]]'' DLC, however, they cannot be crafted. Instead, they can be bought for 10 [[Oinc]]s at [[The Sow's Ear Hat Shop]] in the [[Pig City]]. == {{Pic32|Placeholder}} Trivia == * Since Catcoon is a portmanteau of "cat " and "raccoon", this item is most likely based on the real life [[Wikipedia:Coonskin cap|Coonskin Cap]], made most famous by the frontiersman [[Wikipedia:Davy Crockett|Davy Crockett]].
